title: Enable Encryption in Transit
console_steps: 1. For S3: Open bucket Properties > Default encryption
3. Add bucket policy requiring ssl-only access:
4. For RDS: Modify instance, enable 'Require SSL'
5. For ELB: Configure HTTPS listener with valid cert

references.title: Ensure S3 bucket policy requires SSL
Use strong cryptography to protect data in transit

risk_reduction: High — prevents data interception in transit
rollback_difficulty: Easy — SSL policy can be removed
